title: lupinus arbustus subsp. calcaratus
intro: Lupinus arbustus subsp. calcaratus, also known as the shrubby lupine, is a subspecies of the lupine plant, a flowering perennial native to western North America. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to be used as a natural diuretic and its potential to help lower blood sugar levels. The health benefits of Lupinus arbustus subsp. calcaratus include its antispasmodic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of menopause, anxiety, and digestive issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and optimal uses.
